Abstract.AbstractText: In this Backstory, the authors describe how a multidisciplinary team used epidural electrical stimulation, custom orthoses, and personalized rehabilitation to help a man with a severe spinal cord injury walk again. Their patient-centered approach enabled him to achieve significant milestones, including walking outdoors on snow, highlighting the impact of tailored neurorehabilitation.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declaration of interests L.A. receives or has received research support from Boston Scientific and Fondazione Cariplo. S.M. holds patents on spinal cord stimulation technologies. P.M. receives or has received research support from Boston Scientific.
